gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/332)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/332)
text: ذُكِرَ الْحَائِكُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ مَلْعُونٌ فَقَالَ إِنَّمَا ذَاكَ الَّذِي يَحُوكُ الْكَذِبَ عَلَى اللَّهِ وَ عَلَى رَسُولِهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ).

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from one of his companions,

(It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The weaver mentioned to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, that he is an accursed one’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But rather that is the one who weaves the lie upon Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and upon His<sup>azwj</sup> Rasool<sup>saww</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from certain individuals of his people in a marfu’ manner from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “It was mentioned before abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) that the weaver (knitting) is condemned. The Imam said, ‘It is the one who weaves and fabricates lies against Allah and the Messenger of Allah.”’
